sqlReaderQuery.value:
select t1.* from (select 
ap.Id
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.AssessmentId
,ap.Response
,ap.Comment
,ap.RecommendedHours
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
 INNER JOIN dbo.ABADosageAssessment aa ON ap.AssessmentId = aa.id
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON aa.childProfileId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_ABADosageAssessmentAgreement t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  ap.Id,ap.DateCreated,ap.DateLastModified,ap.DateDeleted,ap.ChildProfileId,ap.AssessmentId,ap.QuestionId,ap.OptionId,ap.Comment	
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap inner join  dbo.ABADosageAssessmentAgreement ag on (ap.AssessmentId=ag.id  )
inner join dbo.ABADosageAssessment aa on ( ap.AssessmentId=aa.id) 
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (aa.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_ABADosageAssessmentResponses t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  
       ap.Id
      ,ap.DateCreated
      ,ap.DateLastModified
      ,ap.DateDeleted
      ,ap.ChildProfileId
      ,ap.TypeId
      ,ap.MemberId
      ,ap.FinishedDate
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap  
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childProfileId=p.id ) 			
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_ABADosageAssessment t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --ab.* 
 ab.id
,ab.startDate
,ab.endDate
,ab.accountInfoId
,ab.coachingSessionHours
,ab.dateCreated
,ab.dateLastModified
,ab.dateDeleted
,ab.coachingSessionHoursTotal
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ab inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (ab.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})

)t1
left join Temp_AccountCoachingSessions t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select ap.Id
,ap.FileId
,ap.AccountFileTagId
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap inner join dbo.AccountFileTag	af on ( ap.AccountFileTagId=af.id)
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (a.ID=af.accountID  )
 where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
 )t1
left join Temp_AccountFileTagToFile t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select ap.Id
,ap.[Name]
,ap.AccountId
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (ap.accountId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_AccountFileTag t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

,AllowToUncancelAppointments

from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} a   where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
--and  t.IsMigrated = 0
)t1
left join Temp_AccountInfo t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

scripts.text: delete from accountinfo where accountOrganizationName IN ('FTC Kids','Inn Health Center')  --Delete new ID 26351 map with FTC Kids

sqlReaderQuery.value:
select t1.* from (select --ap.*
ap.id
,ap.accountInfoId
,ap.[name]
,ap.[description]
,ap.AuditId
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DefaultRoleTypeId
,ap.isAdmin
,ap.tblRoleId
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateCreated
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap  inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )   where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_AccountRole t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  --ap.* 
ap.Id
,ap.activityTestSessionId
,ap.activityQuestionId
,ap.lessonTargetId
,ap.noOfDistractors
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.iepObjectiveId
,ap.difficulty
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}  ap 
inner join  dbo.ActivityTestSessions ats on (ap.ActivityTestsessionid=ats.id    )
inner join dbo.ActivityTests ah on (Activitytestid=ah.id)  
inner join dbo.CurrentActivity ac  on (ah.Currentactivityid=ac.id   )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ac.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 

)t1
left join Temp_ActivityTestSessionResponses t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  --ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.activityTestId
,ap.startTime
,ap.endTime
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.ActivityTests ah on (Activitytestid=ah.id)  
inner join dbo.CurrentActivity ac  on (ah.Currentactivityid=ac.id   )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ac.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_ActivityTestSessions t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select 
ap.Id
,ap.currentActivityId
,ap.startTime
,ap.endTime
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.demo
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join  dbo.CurrentActivity ac   on (ap.Currentactivityid=ac.id   )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ac.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_ActivityTests t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --ap.* 
ap.Id
     ,ap.MemberId
     ,ap.MerchentId
     ,ap.SubscriberId
     ,ap.OrderId
     ,ap.Amount
     ,ap.AffUserId
     ,ap.NewOrderId
     ,ap.TransactionDate
     ,ap.CommisionAmt
     ,ap.AffTransId
     ,ap.DateCreated
     ,ap.DateModified
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
 inner join dbo.tblMember t on (ap.memberid=t.id)
inner join accountinfo a on (t.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_Affiliate t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --an.* 
an.ID
,an.AnswerID
,an.MemberID
,an.Rating
,an.DateCreated
,an.DateLastModified
,an.DateDeleted
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} an  
inner join dbo.tblMember t on (an.memberid=t.id   )
inner join accountinfo a on (t.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 

)t1
left join Temp_AnswerRating t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.id is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --an.* 
 an.ID
,an.AnswerBody
,an.[References]
,an.MemberID
,an.QuestionID
,an.DateCreated
,an.DateLastModified
,an.DateDeleted
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} an  
inner join dbo.tblMember t on (an.memberid=t.id   )
inner join accountinfo a on (t.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_Answer t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --an.* 
an.ID
,an.DateLogged
,an.MemberId
,an.FunctionName
,an.[Action]
,an.[Message]
,an.JsonData
,an.AppType
,an.DateResaved
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} an  
inner join dbo.tblMember t on (an.memberid=t.id   )
inner join accountinfo a on (t.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_ApplicationLog t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}
